title: Real-time Pedestrian Detection on Jetson AGX Orin
description: A deep dive into deploying YOLOv8-nano at 60 fps on edge hardware using TensorRT. Covers quantisation, layer-fusion tricks, and the ROS 2 node architecture that lets EdgeDet slot into any autonomous-vehicle stack.

title: PyTorch Internals: Custom CUDA Kernels for Computer Vision
description: Writing custom CUDA extensions for PyTorch to speed up event-camera preprocessing. Walks through torch.utils.cpp_extension, memory layout considerations, and benchmarking against the naive Python baseline.

title: Event Cameras Meet Enterprise: Lessons from 12 Deployments
description: A retrospective on integrating event-based vision into enterprise robotics pipelines — packaging constraints, latency budgets, SDK design choices, and what actually breaks in production versus in the lab.

title: Building a CI/CD Pipeline for Your LaTeX CV
description: How this very site works: a single cv.tex is parsed by a Python script, rendered through Jinja2, and deployed to GitHub Pages on every push — no manual steps, no drift between your PDF and web CV.
